nasb.text: For behold, the Lord is going to command that the great house be smashed to pieces and the small house to fragments.

esv.text: For behold, the Lord commands, and the great house shall be struck down into fragments, and the little house into bits.

cnv.text: 看哪！耶和華下令，大樓就粉碎， 小屋也要破裂。

ccb.text: 看啊，耶和华一声令下， 大屋顿成瓦砾，小房化为碎片。
